nodes.name: Parse Input
nodes.description:
Validates message is non-empty,
extracts sessionId

nodes.name: Embed Query
nodes.description:
Converts your question to a
768-dim vector via nomic-embed-text-v2-moe
(Ollama, multilingual)

nodes.name: Search Qdrant
nodes.description:
Finds the 5 most semantically
similar document chunks
(cosine similarity ≥ 0.5)

nodes.name: Build RAG Prompt
nodes.description:
Assembles context from retrieved
chunks + formats system prompt
for the LLM

nodes.name: Ollama Chat
nodes.description:
Generates answer using
EuroLLM-9B (RTX 4070 Ti)
~15-20 tok/s, Latvian ✓

nodes.name: Format Response
nodes.description:
Extracts answer text,
attaches source references
+ executionId

nodes.name: Respond
nodes.description:
Returns {answer, sources, executionId}
to the browser
